responsibilities: • prepare and review financial statements under us gaap   • handle sec reporting (10-k, 10 -q) support   • manage gaap conversions from ifrs or indian gaap   • assist in sox compliance and internal controls   • coordinate with us auditors and regulatory teams   • interpret complex accounting topics (revenue, leases, equity)
qualifications: • ca w ith strong us gaap knowledge   • experience with us clients or mncs   • familiarity with sox and sec requirements
